meaning: n.传说,伟人传,图例 联想集团,中国最大的国有品牌微机制造商之一
examples: She was a legend in her own lifetime.
The castle is steeped in history and legend.
It is difficult to separate legend from truth.
The legend is that Veronica and Zaccheus had to flee Palestine and ended up here.
Despite, or perhaps because of its far-flung locale, Vanimo is the stuff of surf legend.
